product_context: Mobile app for financial management for Brazilian MEI freelancers. Currently in growth stage with 1,200 active users, 23% 30-day retention, NPS of 28. Main competitors: Conta Azul MEI, Mobills. Team: 2 backend devs, 1 frontend dev, 1 designer, 1 PM.

okrs.objective: Become the go-to financial tool for Brazilian MEI freelancers
key_results: Increase 30-day retention from 23% to 50% by end of Q2 2026
Increase weekly active users from 340 to 800 by end of Q2 2026
Reduce support tickets related to DAS confusion by 60%

opportunities.title: DAS transparency gap
opportunities.user_job: When the 20th arrives, I want to know exactly what I owe, so I can pay without hiring an accountant
opportunities.evidence: 34% of support tickets, 340-upvote Reddit thread, 8 NPS verbatims

opportunities.title: Day 1 onboarding confusion
opportunities.user_job: When I first open the app, I want to understand what to do immediately, so I dont waste time figuring it out
opportunities.evidence: 47 support tickets citing too complicated, 3 churned user interviews, Day 1 drop-off rate of 68%

opportunities.title: Project-based income model mismatch
opportunities.user_job: When a client pays in installments, I want my cash flow to update automatically, so I can plan without doing math
opportunities.evidence: 23 support tickets, 3 churned interviews confirming as primary abandonment trigger

opportunities.title: MEI revenue ceiling alert
opportunities.user_job: When I approach my annual revenue limit, I want to be warned in plain language, so I can make informed decisions before it is too late
opportunities.evidence: Sebrae 2023: 28% of MEIs exceed limit unknowingly, zero competitors address this

opportunities.title: Freelancer pricing calculator
opportunities.user_job: When a client asks my price, I want to calculate my real cost including taxes, so I can quote confidently
opportunities.evidence: 22k monthly searches for como precificar freelancer, zero competitors in MEI context

constraints.team_size: 2 backend devs, 1 frontend dev, 1 designer, 1 PM
constraints.capacity_note: Each dev can deliver approximately 2 medium features per quarter
